headline: Gerard Piqué Is Rebuilding Football From the Ground Up
dek: Kings League has gone from a viral experiment to a €200M media and sports property — and Piqué is just getting started.

headline: LeBron James Is Not a Brand. He's a Business.
dek: SpringHill Company just crossed a $200M+ valuation — and it's only the beginning of how LeBron is rewriting what athlete ownership really means.

headline: Naomi Osaka Built a Skincare Brand Athletes Actually Need
dek: Kinlò just closed an $18M Series A — and Osaka's bet on melanin-rich skin is turning into one of the sharpest founder plays in athlete CPG.

headline: Lewis Hamilton Is Betting on What Comes After the Podium
dek: From Formula 1 to non-alcoholic spirits and film — Hamilton's off-track empire is accelerating faster than anything he's done behind the wheel.
